name: Bean Curd with a Deliciously Spicy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 Scallions (very finely sliced, including 3/4 of the green part)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce: In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with vegetable stock until smooth.
2. Gradually add chili paste, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and sugar to the sauce. Stir well.
3. Set aside the prepared sauce.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add garlic and ginger; stir-fry for 5 seconds.
6. Add bean curd; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Reduce heat to low, then gently pour in the sauce and mix until well combined.
8. Bring mixture to a simmer and let it thicken, stirring occasionally.
